title: Bayangan di Gerbong Terakhir
theme: Menjelajahi kedalaman penyesalan masa lalu dan proses penerimaan diri, menemukan ketenangan di tengah keheningan malam yang sunyi selama perjalanan pulang.

cover.prompt: View from inside a quiet train carriage at night. Outside the window, a blur of vibrant, glowing city lights streak past, creating dynamic, energetic lines against the deep tones of the night. These abstract light trails suggest the rapid pulse of an urban environment. A subtle, soft silhouette of a person is positioned near the window, their form gently defined by the ambient train illumination, conveying a sense of serene isolation and thoughtful reflection. The window pane shows gentle reflections of these bright city elements, adding to the visual depth. Distant building forms appear as intriguing, indistinct shapes, contributing to an atmosphere of contemplation and a gentle, nostalgic resonance. Focus on depth of field, with the interior subtly in focus and the exterior city lights beautifully blurred.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Clara, seorang desainer grafis freelance, bergulat dengan penyesalan atas keputusan karier masa lalu selama perjalanan kereta malam yang sunyi. Pergumulan batin ini mencapai puncaknya di terowongan gelap, di mana ia menyadari bahwa penyesalan adalah penjara yang ia bangun sendiri. Melalui pencerahan yang menyakitkan namun jujur, ia menerima bahwa ia telah melakukan yang terbaik saat itu, menemukan kedamaian dan harapan untuk masa depan.
meta.target_emotion: Melankolis, introspektif, penyesalan, lalu bergeser ke arah penerimaan, kedamaian, dan harapan.
